metadata.description: Less skills. Deeper connections. A lean, interconnected skill ecosystem for Claude Code.

plugins.name: rune
plugins.description: 58 skills wired into a self-aware 5-layer mesh — 200+ connections, adaptive routing, mesh analytics, logic preservation. Use rune:cook for any code task, rune:team for parallel work, rune:launch for deploy, rune:rescue for legacy code.

plugins.name: @rune-pro
plugins.description: Rune Pro — Product Management, Sales, Data Science, Support. 4 premium packs with deep business workflows. $49 lifetime.

plugins.name: @rune-business
plugins.description: Rune Business — Finance, Legal, HR, Enterprise Search. 4 enterprise packs + all Pro packs included. $149 lifetime.
